sentiment: What stays when the layers fall away is the thing you built on simple ground.

stories.title: SQLite is all you need for durable workflows
stories.summary: An argument that SQLite + Litestream gives you durable workflow state without a separate orchestration tier — especially compelling for AI agents built on simple, inspectable foundations.

stories.title: Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit
stories.summary: Mistral is building the full AI stack: compute, models, and on-prem deployments. The message: the model alone is not enough — the harness, context, and persistence are what matter.

stories.title: MCP is dead?
stories.summary: A measured critique of MCP's context overhead and reliability issues, arguing that plain CLI tools often provide a simpler, more reliable interface for LLM tool use.
